en.name: Chess
en.desc: The ultimate game of strategy! Command your army of 16 pieces against the AI. Master opening theory, tactical combinations, and endgame technique.
en.howToPlay: Click a piece to select it, then click a valid square to move. Green dots show valid moves. Capture the enemy king to win. Each piece has unique movement rules.
tips: Control the center of the board early
Develop your pieces (knights, bishops) before attacks
Castle early to protect your king

zh.name: 国际象棋
zh.desc: 终极策略游戏！指挥你的16枚棋子与AI对战。精通开局理论、战术组合和残局技巧。
zh.howToPlay: 点击棋子选择它，然后点击有效位置移动。绿点显示有效移动。将死敌方国王即可获胜。每种棋子都有独特的移动规则。
tips: 在进攻前先发展棋子（马、象）
尽早王车易位以保护国王
